___________________
*Orbital Outpost is a settlement within a 2 mile radius [[World Elements/Fallstreak\|Fallstreak]]*, generated by the electromagnetic interference from [[Orbital Transport Array 5-12\|Orbital Transport Array 5-12]], built at the base of the megalithic structure once used to deliver supplies to Mars near instantaneously. A landmark feature of [[Regions/The Basin\|The Basin]].
